description: Happy path: before/after split type with niche-appropriate concept returns full thumbnail design

input.concept: Moody dark green accent wall transformation in a vintage-styled bedroom

expect.composition: present, describes what is in frame and spatial layout
expect.note: present, references 1280x720, high contrast, and edge margin guidance

prohibit: overpromising beyond what the concept delivers

description: Minimal inputs: concept string with pov_hero type

input.concept: Thrift store brass candlestick collection styled on a dark wood mantel

expect.composition: present, describes point-of-view framing and subject placement

prohibit: rendering instructions or image generation prompts

description: Edge case: face_room type with a concept that has no obvious face element tests composition adaptation

input.concept: Budget bathroom vanity makeover using peel-and-stick tile and chalk paint

expect.composition: present, describes face placement and room context framing
expect.note: present, references alignment with the title

prohibit: actual image rendering or file output
